response: Cell type deconvolution (RCTD) requires an annotated single-cell reference dataset. The user has explicitly stated they do not have a reference dataset and deconvolution without a reference is not feasible. Please use an alternative approach: 1) If you have a reference dataset, provide its path, or 2) Consider unsupervised clustering methods on the spot-level data to identify spatial patterns without cell type deconvolution.
query_text: Estimate cell type proportions for each spot without any reference dataset.
